text_block_list.name: Child
text_block_list.text: Miss Creeeeek! I'm hungry! Waaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Now, now, don't cry.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I'll give you something really nice! ♪ Here, hold
out your hands.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
There's one thing that I've wanted to see for a
long time...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff, huff...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Trainer, let's pick up the pace... Pant, huff...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: I'm fine. I just... want to see it...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Phew! I worked up a great sweat today. Thank
you for another amazing training session.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I'm feeling great now. Hopefully, I can keep this
up and get through the Sumire Stakes on my way
into the Classics.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Of course. What is it?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I ask her something that's been on my mind. What
is this thing she wants to see?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Huh? Oh, that? Well...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: How many treats do you want, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Yes, treats. How many do you want?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Oh, you! Just be honest with me.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, it's what I used to ask the kids I looked
after.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
My family runs a daycare center, and I often
cared for the kids with my mom.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I'd ask them how many treats they wanted, and
they would all say different things.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
The shy children would only ask for one. The
greedy ones would ask for several.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Everyone had different answers, but there was
one thing that they all shared.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Well... they'd all smile when they got their treats.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: It was always a joy seeing them so happy! ♪

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Sometimes, I think to myself that smiles are what
are most important.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
There are all sorts of children at the daycare
center—some are more fortunate than others.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
But while they're smiling, none of that matters! As
long as I can make them smile, anyone can be
happy, at least for that moment.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I can't be everyone's mom, nor can I take away
the sadness in their hearts. But...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
If I'm able to create even a single happy moment
in their lives, even if it's only for an instant, then
I'll do whatever it takes.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
That's why I can try my hardest, no matter how
tough it may be—to see people smile.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Yeah, that's why I want you to be honest with me.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
If a child doesn't get the number of treats they
want, they won't smile.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
So I'll ask you one more time—Trainer, how many
do you want?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Tell me honestly how many it would take to make
you smile. ♪ I'm sure you want some!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, just one? I like considerate children, but I
feel like you're holding back...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Is that how many you want? Would one per month
in April and May really be enough?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One per month... in April and May?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A thought crosses my mind. Could it be that she's
talking not about treats, but about races?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Tell me how many you really, really want. Go on.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for being honest. So you want three of
them, right? ♪

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I feel the same way. Miss Creek wants to give you
three as well.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Ah, right. I'm not "Miss Creek" here! I thought I
was back at the daycare center for a second
there.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Sorry! You're my trainer, not one of the kids.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We look at each other and laugh. I think I know
what the treats really mean now.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: All right then. I've promised you three treats.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I can't give them to you now, but I definitely will...
eventually.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, I've got somewhere to be now, so I'll see
you later.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Super Creek leaves and heads back towards the
academy. What exactly is she up to?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff, pant... I can still keep going. Just a little longer...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I need to get stronger to give Trainer all three
treats. The Satsuki Sho, the Derby, and the
Kikuka Sho...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
There's only one thing I want to see, and I need to
do this if I want to make it happen...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: I want to—no, have to see it this fall. I will make Trainer smile!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff, huff... Cough...
